live_migration_support_notes: Live migration is allowed only when CDC commitlog capture is enabled and mutation ordering/key identity is provable; otherwise token polling is waiver-only and not transaction-consistent live.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: SSTable snapshot or token-range read at schema/version boundary
delta_feed_or_change_capture: CDC commitlog events preserving partition/clustering key and mutation order
proxy_method: native protocol proxy with keyspace/table readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: token-range polling by primary key/writetime; no transaction-consistent live claim without CDC or exact mutation feed
required_cutover_barrier: CDC drained through high-water segment; schema agreement stable; tombstone/TTL/counter handling verified; token-range compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
